title: ts#mcp-server
description: Add a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server to an existing TypeScript project

project.description: The project to add an MCP server to
project.x-prompt: Select the TypeScript project to add the MCP server to

name.description: The name of your MCP server (default: mcp-server)
name.x-prompt: What would you like to call your MCP server? (default: mcp-server)

auth.description: The method used to authenticate with your MCP server. Only applicable when infra is set (ignored when infra is none).
auth.x-prompt: How would you like to authenticate with your MCP server?

iacProvider.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iacProvider.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: inherit)

infra.description: The type of infrastructure to host your MCP server. Select none for no hosting.
infra.x-prompt: How would you like to host your MCP server?
